sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13935" key="a)posfendo/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσφενδόν-ητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13935.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">driven away by the sling,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">293b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
